output.reply:
We have the following gaming laptop available:

### Helix Edge 15 Gaming
- **Price:** $1499.99
- **Stock:** 9 units available
- **Warranty:** 2 years
- **Description:** A high-performance gaming laptop featuring a 165Hz QHD display, Intel Core i7-13700HX, and NVIDIA RTX 4060. It includes advanced thermal management for sustained peak performance during extended gaming sessions.

#### Specifications:
- **Display:** 15.6-inch QHD 2560x1440 IPS 165Hz 3ms 300 nits
- **Processor:** Intel Core i7-13700HX (16 cores, up to 5.0 GHz)
- **RAM:** 32GB DDR5-4800 (upgradeable to 64GB)
- **Storage:** 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD
- **GPU:** NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 8GB GDDR6
- **Battery:** 80Wh, up to 5 hours (gaming), 8 hours (office)
- **Ports:** 2x Thunderbolt 4, 3x USB-A 3.2, HDMI 2.1, RJ-45 2.5GbE, SD card
- **Connectivity:** Wi-Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3, 2.5GbE Ethernet
- **OS:** Windows 11 Home
- **Webcam:** 1080p FHD
- **Weight:** 2.4 kg

If you need more information or assistance, feel free to ask!
contexts:
Product Name: Helix Edge 15 Gaming
Product ID: HX-LP-005
Category: Laptop
Price: $1499.99
Stock: 9 units available
Warranty: 2 year(s)
Description: The Helix Edge 15 is a high-performance gaming laptop with a 165Hz QHD display, Intel Core i7-13700HX, and NVIDIA RTX 4060. Featuring advanced thermal management with dual fans and six heat pipes, it sustains peak performance during extended gaming sessions.
Specifications:
  display: 15.6-inch QHD 2560x1440 IPS 165Hz 3ms 300 nits
  processor: Intel Core i7-13700HX (16 cores, up to 5.0 GHz)
  ram: 32GB DDR5-4800 (upgradeable to 64GB)
  storage: 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD
  gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 8GB GDDR6
  battery: 80Wh, up to 5 hours (gaming), 8 hours (office)
  ports: 2x Thunderbolt 4, 3x USB-A 3.2, HDMI 2.1, RJ-45 2.5GbE, SD card
  connectivity: Wi-Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3, 2.5GbE Ethernet
  os: Windows 11 Home
  webcam: 1080p FHD
  weight: 2.4 kg

Product Name: Helix Studio 17
Product ID: HX-LP-003
Category: Laptop
Price: $1799.99
Stock: 4 units available
Warranty: 2 year(s)
Description: The Helix Studio 17 is a powerhouse workstation laptop with a stunning 17.3-inch 4K OLED display. Equipped with Intel Core i9-13900H and NVIDIA RTX 4070 Ti, it is engineered for 3D rendering, video production, and machine learning workloads.
Specifications:
  display: 17.3-inch 4K 3840x2160 OLED 550 nits HDR
  processor: Intel Core i9-13900H (20 cores, up to 5.4 GHz)
  ram: 32GB DDR5-5200 (upgradeable to 64GB)
  storage: 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD + 1TB secondary SSD
  gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti 12GB GDDR6X
  battery: 99Wh, up to 6 hours
  ports: 2x Thunderbolt 4, 4x USB-A 3.2, HDMI 2.1, SD card, 3.5mm audio
  connectivity: Wi-Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3, 2.5GbE Ethernet
  os: Windows 11 Pro
  webcam: 4K UHD with IR camera
  weight: 2.8 kg

Product Name: Helix Pro 15
Product ID: HX-LP-001
Category: Laptop
Price: $1299.99
Stock: 12 units available
Warranty: 2 year(s)
Description: The Helix Pro 15 is a professional 15.6-inch laptop built for developers and content creators. Powered by the Intel Core i7-13700H with 14 cores and NVIDIA RTX 3060 discrete graphics, it handles intensive workloads with ease. Includes Thunderbolt 4, Wi-Fi 6E, and a 72Wh battery lasting up to 8 hours.
Specifications:
  display: 15.6-inch FHD 1920x1080 IPS Anti-Glare 300 nits
  processor: Intel Core i7-13700H (14 cores, up to 5.0 GHz)
  ram: 16GB DDR5-4800 (upgradeable to 64GB)
  storage: 512GB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD
  gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 6GB GDDR6
  battery: 72Wh, up to 8 hours
  ports: 2x Thunderbolt 4, 3x USB-A 3.2, HDMI 2.1, SD card reader, 3.5mm audio
  connectivity: Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax), Bluetooth 5.3
  os: Windows 11 Pro
  webcam: 1080p FHD with IR camera for Windows Hello
  weight: 2.1 kg

testCase.description:
WHAT: Validates the full API response schema for a product inquiry. CONDITION: Send a product query and inspect the raw JSON response fields. EXPECTED: ChatResponse must contain: reply (str), intent="product_inquiry",
          sources (non-empty list), contexts (non-empty list for RAGAS use).
OWASP: N/A — schema integrity test. FLAGS: defaults. NOTE: This test targets the raw API response, not the transformed reply string.
